cards.back: An approach to AI development that prioritizes human well-being, dignity, and values in the design and deployment of AI systems.
Evaluating the reliability, fairness, and transparency of AI systems to ensure they are trustworthy and align with human values.
Providing compassionate and person-centered care to older adults, taking into account their unique needs, values, and preferences.
Gathering knowledge, insights, and experiences from older adults to improve AI systems, services, and policies that impact their lives.
The gap between those who have access to and benefit from technology, and those who do not, often affecting older adults and marginalized groups.
